same_component_count: How many nodes, including node {query_label} itself, are in the same connected component as {query_label}?
Count the nodes in the connected component containing {query_label}, including {query_label}.
What is the size of the connected component that contains node {query_label}?
For node {query_label}, how many nodes are connected to it in the same component, including itself?
How many labeled nodes belong to node {query_label}'s connected component?
largest_component_size: How many nodes are in the largest connected component?
Count the nodes in the largest connected component.
What is the size of the largest connected component?
Find the largest connected component. How many nodes does it contain?
How many labeled nodes belong to the largest connected component?
reachable_count: How many nodes, excluding node {query_label} itself, are reachable from {query_label} in the directed graph?
From node {query_label}, how many other nodes are reachable in the directed graph?
What is the number of nodes reachable from {query_label} along directed edges, excluding {query_label} itself?
Starting at node {query_label}, how many other nodes are reachable?
How many labeled nodes besides {query_label} can be reached from {query_label}?
reachable_count_after_edge_removal: If the arrow from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b} were removed, how many nodes, including node {query_label} itself, would be reachable from {query_label} by following arrows?
After removing the arrow from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}, how many nodes could be reached from {query_label}, including {query_label}?
Imagine deleting the directed edge from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}. How many labeled nodes would remain reachable from {query_label} when arrow directions are followed?
If node {edit_label_a} no longer pointed to node {edit_label_b}, how many nodes would be reachable from node {query_label}, including itself?
Remove the arrow from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}. Following arrow directions from {query_label}, how many nodes would be reachable?
reachable_count_after_edge_addition: If an arrow were added from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}, how many nodes, including node {query_label} itself, would be reachable from {query_label} by following arrows?
After adding an arrow from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}, how many nodes could be reached from {query_label}, including {query_label}?
Imagine drawing a new directed edge from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}. How many labeled nodes would be reachable from {query_label} when arrow directions are followed?
If node {edit_label_a} pointed to node {edit_label_b}, how many nodes would be reachable from node {query_label}, including itself?
Add an arrow from node {edit_label_a} to node {edit_label_b}. Following arrow directions from {query_label}, how many nodes would be reachable?
common_neighbor_count: How many nodes are connected to both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
Count the nodes that are neighbors of both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}.
What is the number of labeled nodes adjacent to both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
How many shared neighboring nodes do node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b} have?
Find the nodes directly connected to both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}. How many are there?
common_successor_count: Following outgoing arrows, how many nodes are direct successors of both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
How many labeled nodes have incoming arrows from both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
Count the common outgoing-arrow targets of node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}.
What is the number of nodes that both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b} point to directly?
How many shared direct successors do node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b} have?
common_predecessor_count: How many nodes point directly to both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
Count the common direct predecessors of node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}.
What is the number of labeled nodes with outgoing arrows to both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
How many nodes are direct predecessors of both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}?
Find the nodes that send arrows to both node {query_label_a} and node {query_label_b}. How many are there?
component_size_after_edge_removal: If the edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b} were removed, how many nodes, including node {query_label} itself, would be in the same connected component as {query_label}?
After removing the edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}, what would be the size of node {query_label}'s connected component?
Imagine deleting the edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}. How many labeled nodes would remain connected to node {query_label}, including {query_label}?
If node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b} were no longer directly connected by an edge, how many nodes would be in the component containing node {query_label}?
Remove the edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}. How many nodes would belong to node {query_label}'s connected component?
component_size_after_edge_addition: If an edge were added between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}, how many nodes, including node {query_label} itself, would be in the same connected component as {query_label}?
After adding an edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}, what would be the size of node {query_label}'s connected component?
Imagine drawing a new edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}. How many labeled nodes would be connected to node {query_label}, including {query_label}?
If node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b} became directly connected by an edge, how many nodes would be in the component containing node {query_label}?
Add an edge between node {edit_label_a} and node {edit_label_b}. How many nodes would belong to node {query_label}'s connected component?
unique_cycle_size: The graph contains exactly one cycle. How many nodes are in that cycle?
How many nodes lie on the graph's unique cycle?
Count the nodes that are part of the only cycle in the graph.
What is the size, in nodes, of the unique cycle?
Find the single cycle in the graph. How many nodes does it include?
largest_chordless_cycle_size: A chordless cycle has no extra edge connecting two non-adjacent nodes in the cycle. What is the size, in nodes, of the largest chordless cycle?
Find the largest chordless cycle, meaning a cycle with no chords between non-adjacent cycle nodes. How many nodes does it contain?
Among cycles with no extra edge joining non-adjacent nodes on the cycle, what is the largest cycle size?
Count the nodes in one largest chordless cycle. A chordless cycle has no edge between non-neighboring nodes on that cycle.
What is the maximum number of nodes in a chordless cycle in this graph?
next_in_hamiltonian_cycle_label: Use the Hamiltonian-cycle direction that starts at node {orientation_start_label} and returns to it from node {orientation_final_label}. Which node comes immediately after the starting node {orientation_start_label} along this cycle?

Start at {orientation_start_label} and move around the Hamiltonian cycle so that {orientation_final_label} is last before returning to the start. What node is immediately after {orientation_start_label} along that cycle?
With {orientation_start_label} as the first cycle node and {orientation_final_label} as the final node before returning, which node follows {orientation_start_label} along the Hamiltonian cycle?
Traverse the Hamiltonian cycle from {orientation_start_label} through to {orientation_final_label}. What is the next node after {orientation_start_label} on that cycle?
In the stated start-to-final Hamiltonian-cycle direction, which node comes after the start node {orientation_start_label}?
previous_in_hamiltonian_cycle_label: Use the Hamiltonian-cycle direction that starts at node {orientation_start_label} and returns to it from node {orientation_final_label}. Which node comes immediately before the final node {orientation_final_label} along this cycle?

Start at {orientation_start_label} and move around the Hamiltonian cycle so that {orientation_final_label} is last before returning to the start. What node is immediately before {orientation_final_label} along that cycle?
With {orientation_start_label} as the first cycle node and {orientation_final_label} as the final node before returning, which node precedes {orientation_final_label} along the Hamiltonian cycle?
Traverse the Hamiltonian cycle from {orientation_start_label} through to {orientation_final_label}. What is the previous node before {orientation_final_label} on that cycle?
In the stated start-to-final Hamiltonian-cycle direction, which node comes before the final node {orientation_final_label}?
edge_between_nodes_label: What label is shown on the edge between node {source_label} and node {target_label}?
Read the edge connecting node {source_label} and node {target_label}. What label is on it?
Which text label appears on the edge between {source_label} and {target_label}?
Find the edge joining node {source_label} to node {target_label}. What label does it show?
What is the visible label attached to the edge between node {source_label} and node {target_label}?
directed_edge_between_nodes_label: What label is shown on the arrow from node {source_label} to node {target_label}?
Read the directed edge from node {source_label} to node {target_label}. What label is on it?
Which text label appears on the arrow from {source_label} to {target_label}?
Find the arrow from node {source_label} to node {target_label}. What label does it show?
What is the visible label attached to the arrow from node {source_label} to node {target_label}?
unique_neighbor_label: Which node is the only neighbor of node {query_label}?
Node {query_label} has exactly one neighbor. What is that neighbor's label?
Find the single node connected directly to node {query_label}. Which label does it have?
What label is on the only node adjacent to node {query_label}?
Identify the unique node joined by an edge to node {query_label}. What is its label?
unique_successor_label: Which node is the only outgoing-arrow target of node {query_label}?
Node {query_label} has exactly one direct successor. What is that successor's label?
Following the one arrow leaving node {query_label}, which node does it reach?
What label is on the only node that node {query_label} points to directly?
Identify the unique direct successor of node {query_label}. What is its label?
unique_predecessor_label: Which node is the only direct predecessor of node {query_label}?
Node {query_label} has exactly one incoming arrow. What is the source node's label?
Find the one node with an arrow directly into node {query_label}. Which label does it have?
What label is on the only node that points directly to node {query_label}?
Identify the unique direct predecessor of node {query_label}. What is its label?
